textByHash.1cf08f0f5641e49bbb6fe0fede3e1d8bac0ea1ab: It's a small excavation, so only two of us can work on it at a time.
textByHash.3850bd9f3d4eac4961f38e0d58b34e5bcdfa3c9d: I'm working on the digging, of course.
textByHash.511e6c6306e4a49a99044390b1476f42806a0a9e: I'm not scared of monsters - I won't let them stop me from digging!
textByHash.de3bd4980da6683cd2621e4ee013d19daec0a873: Thorodin and Donal were working on it earlier, but I hear Donal's run off to hide in the inn.
textByHash.f9ffed8d90ae731219af7c75b86c726129321956: Apparently he saw a monster when he was in the caves.
